_meta.note: Sample mundane or minor gear flavored for Dragon Heirs. Merged into equipment.json. tagIds reference tagsDragon + core tags.json after bundle merge.
_meta.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf — thematic gear adjacent to Flight examples (paraphrase only)

eqDragObsidianShard.name: Obsidian shard focus
eqDragObsidianShard.description: Volcanic glass kept blood-warm; hums when Memory stirs nearby.
eqDragObsidianShard.mechanicalEffects: Minor Enhancement to Occult or Integrity when tracing draconic clues; SG discretion.

eqDragSerpentSignet.name: Serpent signet ring
eqDragSerpentSignet.description: Greenstone carved as twin fangs; marks messages between ecoterror cells.
eqDragSerpentSignet.mechanicalEffects: Social leverage among Heirs who recognize the Flight; not a full Relic unless upgraded.

eqDragDraqBurnerPhone.name: Burner stack (chaos ops)
eqDragDraqBurnerPhone.description: Prepaid layers for agitators who don’t want a pantheon reading their metadata.
eqDragDraqBurnerPhone.mechanicalEffects: Enhancement to Subterfuge or Technology when covering tracks in short scenes.
